📋 EPISODE SETUP
🎬 STEP 2 — PODCAST INTRO (First 8 Seconds)
Becky writes a powerful opening that hooks listeners in the first 8 seconds. This becomes your first clip in Vmake.
📝 STEP 3 — FULL EPISODE SCRIPT
Becky writes the complete episode script in your host's voice. Educational, conversational, never preachy. Break it into 6-8 second clips for Vmake.
📄 STEP 4 — SHOW NOTES + DESCRIPTION
Becky writes professional show notes for your video description on YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram.
📱 STEP 5 — SOCIAL CAPTIONS + HASHTAGS
Becky writes ready-to-post captions for every platform with the right hashtags.
── PODCAST VIDEO PIPELINE ──
🎬 FREE CLIP PIPELINE → VMAKE
1Copy your intro + script from above — split into 6-8 second spoken segments
2Open a free clip generator — CapCut or Hailuo — generate each clip with your host image
3Download all clips to your phone
4Open Vmake — join all clips into one complete podcast episode
5Add captions from Step 5 — then post to TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook!
